roles.content: Predicate logic: A comprehensive examination of predicate logic within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on predicate logic: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to predicate logic.
Recent developments in predicate logic: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of predicate logic in contemporary philosophy.
